title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXIII. Games.
content:
Ride a cock-horse to Banbury-cross,
        To see an old lady upon a white horse,
        Rings on her fingers, and bells on her toes,
        And so she makes music wherever she goes.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXIII. Games.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
